antipattern.symptom: RAG returns wrong documents intermittently; ~1% of queries off by one input.
antipattern.root-cause: Response not order-preserving; code paired by list index instead of `item.index`.
antipattern.fix: `response.data.sort(key=lambda x: x.index)` before mapping back to input texts.

antipattern.symptom: Cohere NDCG 5–10pp below expected on bench.
antipattern.root-cause: `input_type` parameter omitted; defaulted to generic mode.
antipattern.fix: Pass `input_type='search_document'` at index time, `'search_query'` at query time. Reject Cohere config that does not specify both.

antipattern.symptom: Ingestion fails with API error OR (worse) silently rejects and embedding has wrong dim.
antipattern.fix: Validate at config time: `dimensions` only allowed when model_name starts with `text-embedding-3-`.

antipattern.symptom: Mistral embeds long docs but retrieval misses tail content; no error.
antipattern.root-cause: Some versions silently truncate at 512 tokens.
antipattern.fix: Pre-chunk to `max_context_tokens` from quirks. Reject single texts exceeding model context.

antipattern.symptom: BGE-M3 embed call returns dict; downstream code expects list[float]; ingestion fails silently or rows have empty vectors.
antipattern.root-cause: Sparse format is dict[token → weight], not dense array.
antipattern.fix: Convert: route to a sparse-capable DB OR convert dict to dense float array before upsert.
